summary: Testing iteration 17 - Full rebrand testing (update mode). UnifiedDashboard replaces role selection. All rebrand features verified: split view dashboard with Player characters (blue) and GM campaigns (red), header Review/Referral buttons, blue login button, square corners. Critical BUG found: /campaigns/new route missing.

ui_bugs.issue: New Campaign button navigates to /campaigns/new which has NO ROUTE defined, resulting in blank page

frontend_tests.unified-dashboard-rebrand.spec.ts: 14 passed - NEW: Rebrand tests for UnifiedDashboard, color schemes, header buttons, square corners
frontend_tests.auth-flow.spec.ts: 12 passed - UPDATED: Login/register now redirect to /home (UnifiedDashboard)
frontend_tests.player-dashboard.spec.ts: 8 passed - UPDATED: Navigate to /player directly, removed 'Enter as Player' button reference
frontend_tests.dashboard-features.spec.ts: 7 passed - UPDATED: Use existing test campaign, updated NPC/ROOK button assertions
frontend_tests.golden-path.spec.ts: 4 passed - UPDATED: End combat navigates to Campaign Dashboard, GM Screen via direct nav

action_items: HIGH: Add /campaigns/new route to App.js - Currently clicking 'New Campaign' from UnifiedDashboard navigates to /campaigns/new but this route doesn't exist. Options: (1) Add dedicated route for campaign creation page, or (2) Change navigation to /campaigns and auto-open the create dialog
seed_data_creation: Using existing test character TEST_Elara_Wizard (ID: 5c200c1f-d584-4b3d-a3a2-e1b49b404e8d) and campaign TEST_CAMPAIGN_ID (1e6a6d0d-ad88-4b8a-9cc5-a1672119343c)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rebrand verified: UnifiedDashboard at /home replaces role selection. After login, users see split view with 'MY CHARACTERS' (blue, left) and 'MY CAMPAIGNS' (red, right). Header has Review (review-btn) and Referral (referral-btn) buttons. New Character (new-character-btn) navigates to /character-builder (WORKS). New Campaign (new-campaign-btn) navigates to /campaigns/new (BROKEN - no route). End Combat now navigates to Campaign Dashboard (/campaign/:id), not GM Screen. GM Screen button on Campaign Dashboard opens in new tab. Color scheme: --gm-primary: #A4243B (red), --player-primary: #2563EB (blue). Border-radius reduced to 2-4px for square corners.

unified_dashboard_loads.description: UnifiedDashboard loads at /home after login with split view for characters and campaigns

my_characters_section.description: MY CHARACTERS section on left uses blue color scheme (--player-primary)

my_campaigns_section.description: MY CAMPAIGNS section on right uses red color scheme (--gm-primary)

review_button.description: Review button in header opens modal with star rating

referral_button.description: Referral button in header opens modal with referral code

new_campaign_navigation.description: New Campaign button navigates to /campaigns/new but route doesn't exist - BLANK PAGE

auth_page_blue_login.description: Auth page login button uses blue color (--player-primary)

square_corners.description: Buttons and cards have square corners (border-radius 2-4px)
